message:
share: fail deployment planning fast on invalid bundle paths

Validate wizard inputs at the start of deployment plan generation instead of deferring bundle-path errors until later planning stages.

This makes invalid bundle paths fail before provider-specific planning work begins, which keeps the planner's behavior aligned with the rest of the wizard validation flow and avoids constructing partial plans around nonexistent bundles.

Also add a regression test covering an explicitly missing bundle path so BundleNotFound is returned from generate_plan() before any downstream planning logic runs.
